## Summary

<!-- What does this change do? -->

## Motivation

<!-- What problem does it solve, and why is this approach appropriate? -->

## Changes

<!-- Call out public API, CLI, scenario-schema, adapter, or trace-format changes. -->

## Verification

<!-- List the commands, scenarios, and seeds used to verify the change. -->

## Compatibility

- [ ] This change is backward compatible.
- [ ] Breaking behavior is clearly identified above.
- [ ] Deterministic replay behavior was considered.

## Checklist

- [ ] The pull request title follows Conventional Commits (for example, `feat: add partition fault`).
- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally.
- [ ] Tests cover the behavior or the reason they are unnecessary is explained.
- [ ] `npm run pack:check` was run if package contents or exports changed.
- [ ] No generated artifacts, traces, credentials, or sensitive scenario data are included.
